title: 🔍 ArkOS4Clone DTB Identification Tool
subtitle: DTB File Identification Using MD5 and Panel Parameters - ArkOS4Clone / Aurknix
instructions.title: 📋 Instructions (Supported: 中文, English, 日本語, 한국어, Deutsch, Português)
instructions.step2: • MD5 is calculated and matched against known configurations
instructions.step3: • Identification suggestions based on match level
upload.drag: Drag and drop DTB file here
upload.click: or click the button below to select a file
result.title: Identification Results
loading.title: Identifying DTB file...
loading.subtitle: Please wait
exactMatch: ✅ Exact match with development DTB. Use this option for full compatibility with your device.
screenMatch: ⚠️ Partial Match (Panel Parameters Matched, MD5 Differs)
screenMatchDesc: The panel parameters match, but the MD5 differs. You can test the following device options:
screenMatchAdvice: Run dtb_selector and try each option below to find the best compatibility:
dtbToolTip: 🔧 For joystick inversion or battery capacity modification, visit DTB Tools
noMatchDesc: This device is not currently supported.
noMatchDetails: Nodes that did not fully match:
noMatchTip:
💡 If you want ArkOS4Clone to support this device, please send me the DTB file.
Please keep an SD card available for testing ArkOS4Clone.
Include your Discord contact info in the email for easier communication.
⚠️ Please remember to manually attach the DTB file to the email!
emailButton: 📧 Email via Gmail to Request Adaptation
emailConfirmDiscord: • Your Discord username can be searched and added
emailConfirmTime: • You have enough time for follow-up testing
emailConfirmContribute: • Willing to help users with the same device
saveBoardPhoto:
Have you saved the board photos on your computer?

📋 Required Files Checklist:
1. Clear board photos (front and back)
2. DTB file
3. Discord contact info

⚠️ Missing any of these will result in no response!
canRunArkos: Can your device run the ArkOS4Clone system?
